pullRequest.title: Add LambdaTest, Service Now, Interledger, and Modtoberfest
pullRequest.body:
The first few days of Hacktoberfest are already past, so let's get some more projects on the Swag List!

This adds LambdaTest, Service Now, Interledger, and Modtoberfest.

Closes #1007
Closes #992
Closes #994
Closes #995
